delete.search: [('name', 'in', [ 'Internal shipments: confirmed recipient read', 'Internal shipment lines: confirmed recipient read', 'Internal shipment history: confirmed recipient read', ]), ('model_id.model', 'in', [ 'ab_internal_shipment', 'ab_internal_shipment.line', 'ab_internal_shipment.history', ])]

record.field: ['|', '&', '&', ('state', '=', 'awaiting_receipt'), ('recipient_type', '=', 'branch'), ('recipient_store_id', 'in', user.ab_department_ids.store_id.ids), '&', '!', '&', ('state', '=', 'awaiting_receipt'), ('recipient_type', '=', 'branch'), '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', '|', ('created_by_id', '=', user.id), '&', ('sender_type', '=', 'employee'), ('sender_employee_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids), '&', ('sender_type', '=', 'employee'), ('sender_employee_id.department_id.manager_id.user_id', '=', user.id), '&', ('sender_type', '=', 'employee'), ('sender_employee_id.department_id.store_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.department_id.store_id.ids), '&', ('sender_type', '=', 'department'), ('sender_department_id.manager_id.user_id', '=', user.id), '&', ('sender_type', '=', 'branch'), '|', ('sender_store_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.department_id.store_id.ids), ('sender_store_id', 'in', user.ab_department_ids.store_id.ids), '|', '|', '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'employee'), ('recipient_employee_id', 'in', user.ab_employee_ids.ids), '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'department'), ('recipient_department_id.manager_id.user_id', '=', user.id), '&', ('recipient_type', '=', 'branch'), ('recipient_store_id', 'in', user.ab_department_ids.store_id.ids)]
Internal shipment lines: user read access

Internal shipment history: user read access
